# Task 001 — Progress Details

## Objective
Convert ContosoInsurance.Worker and ContosoInsurance.Common from legacy non-SDK .csproj files targeting .NET Framework 4.6.1 to SDK-style .csproj files targeting net9.0.

## Files Modified

### ContosoInsurance.Common
- **`ContosoInsurance.Common.csproj`** — Rewritten to SDK-style. Removed all legacy `<Import>`, `<PropertyGroup>` platform sections, `<Reference>` HintPath entries. Added `<PackageReference>` for log4net 3.3.2, Newtonsoft.Json 13.0.3, System.Configuration.ConfigurationManager 9.0.0. Set TFM to net9.0.
- **`packages.config`** — Deleted (migrated to PackageReference).
- **`Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs`** — Deleted (auto-generated by SDK).
- **`Config/ConfigHelper.cs`** — Changed `GetSetting` return type to `string?` and parameter to `string?` for nullable correctness.
- **`Logging/AppLogger.cs`** — Changed `Error` parameter `ex` to `Exception?` for nullable correctness.

### ContosoInsurance.Worker
- **`ContosoInsurance.Worker.csproj`** — Rewritten to SDK-style targeting net9.0. Removed `<Reference>` items for System, System.Configuration, System.Configuration.Install, System.Core, System.ServiceProcess (legacy framework refs). Added `<PackageReference>` for System.ServiceProcess.ServiceController 9.0.0. Simplified ProjectReference elements (removed legacy `<Project>` and `<Name>` subelements).
- **`packages.config`** — Deleted.
- **`Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs`** — Deleted.
- **`ProjectInstaller.cs`** — Deleted. Used `System.Configuration.Install` (Installer, ServiceProcessInstaller, ServiceInstaller) which have no .NET 9 equivalent. The Windows Service installation pattern is replaced in Task 2 by Generic Host.
- **`ClaimsExporterService.cs`** — Added `[SupportedOSPlatform("windows")]` attribute to fix CA1416 warnings. Changed `Timer? _timer` to nullable. Fixed CS8604 in Export() by using `?? @"C:\Exports"` fallback. Changed `Csv(string v)` to `Csv(string? v)`.
- **`Program.cs`** — Added `[SupportedOSPlatform("windows")]` to fix CA1416 warning. Added `using System.Runtime.Versioning`.

### ContosoInsurance.Data (transitive — required for Worker build)
- **`ContosoInsurance.Data.csproj`** — Rewritten to SDK-style targeting net9.0. Added PackageReference for Microsoft.Data.SqlClient 5.2.2 (replacing legacy System.Data.SqlClient assembly reference). Removed explicit `<Compile>` items (SDK includes by convention).
- **`Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs`** — Deleted.
- **`ClaimsRepository.cs`**, **`PolicyRepository.cs`**, **`UserRepository.cs`** — Changed `using System.Data.SqlClient` to `using Microsoft.Data.SqlClient`. Fixed nullable warnings in models and return types.
- **`Models/Claim.cs`** — String properties changed to `string?` (nullable).
- **`Models/Policy.cs`** — String properties changed to `string?` (nullable).
- **`Models/User.cs`** — String properties changed to `string?` (nullable).

## Build Result
- ContosoInsurance.Common: **Build succeeded — 0 warnings, 0 errors**
- ContosoInsurance.Worker: **Build succeeded — 0 warnings, 0 errors**
- ContosoInsurance.Data: **Build succeeded — 0 warnings, 0 errors**

## Notes
- ContosoInsurance.Services and ContosoInsurance.Web still target net461 and are out of scope for this task (they use WCF and WebForms which require separate migration effort).
- log4net upgraded from 2.0.17 to 3.3.2 to clear NU1902 security advisory.
- Task 2 will replace ServiceBase/ProjectInstaller with Generic Host BackgroundService, removing the System.ServiceProcess.ServiceController dependency.
